name: set_asset_property
description: Set a serialized property on a project asset (ScriptableObject, Material, etc.) by its asset path. Supports bool, int, float, string, enum, Vector2, Vector3, Color, and object references.

value.description: The value to set as a string. For vectors use 'x,y,z', for colors use 'r,g,b,a', for object references use the asset path.
